findings.title: Handoff contract: new TODO items committed non-atomically with code changes
findings.suggested_fix: CLAUDE.md Handoff Contract / On End, rule 4 states: Both updates in the same commit as the code changes (atomic). The new TODO items F28d, A14a, D27a (and [next] tags on F29, F30) were added in a separate commit baa1e23 (Add new TODO items surfaced during build 18) rather than in the code commit 4526bbf. The same section states Never commit code without updating the tracking files / Never update tracking files without corresponding code. The fix was applied retroactively in baa1e23 rather than included in 4526bbf, breaking the invariant. No action needed before merge (the items are present), but this pattern should be corrected in future overnight builds. The prompt-hardening commits (3cdc370, aafbb0b, 36bd295) that followed indicate the builder itself recognized and attempted to correct the root cause.

residual_risks.title: A14 and D27 UI changes not visually verified
residual_risks.description: CLAUDE.md states Visually verify UI changes in browser or flag not visually verified. The code commit message explicitly flags both A14 (ChartSkeleton) and D27 (BotCard title tooltip) as Not visually verified. The standard allows flagging as an alternative, so this is compliant in form, but the skeleton CSS uses a hardcoded dark color (#21262d) that may not match the app theme under light mode or future theme changes, and the browser native title tooltip has a ~1s hover delay and no dark-theme styling (already captured as D27a in TODO). No blocker for merge, but orchestrator should visually confirm before closing the overnight PR.

residual_risks.title: validate_logic field_validator targets optional fields that may not exist on UpdateBotRequest
residual_risks.description: The @field_validator in UpdateBotRequest (routes/bots.py) lists 6 logic fields with Optional[str] type and None-safe guard. Pydantic v2 field_validators only fire when the field is present in the model; if any of the listed field names do not exist on UpdateBotRequest as declared fields, Pydantic v2 may raise a ConfigError at class definition time. Not a CLAUDE.md violation but worth confirming the fields are declared on that model.

testing_gaps.title: No test coverage for validate_logic rejection path
testing_gaps.description: F28b adds @field_validator restricting buy_logic/sell_logic to AND|OR across 5 models. The existing backend test harness (F20, test_bot_runner.py) does not cover Pydantic validation rejection. A test passing a value like BOTH or all to QuickBacktestRequest should confirm a 422 is returned rather than silent fallback to OR semantics.
